ddls:
CREATE TABLE "feedback_surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the feedback survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feedback survey */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the survey (active, draft, archived) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the survey was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the survey was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the survey */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback question */,
  "question_order" INTEGER /* Order of the question in the survey */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (multiple choice, rating, open-ended) */,
  "is_optional" INTEGER /* Indicates if the question is optional */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the question was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the question */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES feedback_surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the feedback belongs to */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing the feedback */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was submitted */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the customer */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used by the customer */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the feedback */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES feedback_surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback the response belongs to */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response is for */,
  "response_value" TEXT /* Value of the response */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_responses_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES customer_feedback ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES feedback_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the customer */,
  "purchase_history_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's purchase history */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Customer segment (e.g., frequent buyer, new customer) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the customer account */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the customer account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the role */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user account */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mapping was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the mapping */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating for the question */,
  "total_responses" INTEGER /* Total number of responses for the question */,
  "top_comments" TEXT /* Top comments for the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analysis was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the analysis */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_analysis_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES feedback_questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_analysis_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES feedback_surveys ("survey_id")
)
